name: Mrs. Ludka's Homemade Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in cooking oil or butter.
2. Add remaining ingredients to the sauteed onions and oil; cook until thickened.
This sauce is delicious on baked chicken, ribs, beef, or pork roast. It's especially good when used outdoors at barbecues. My family has enjoyed this recipe for over 40 years, passed down from a neighbor after my mother got married. The aroma was so inviting that she knocked on the neighbor's door to learn the secret recipe. Enjoy it with your favorite grilled meats, and serve any leftover sauce on the side for dipping.
